one_time_description: Williams Treaty Trust revenue of $6,746,215 recognized in 2024 (up from $4,467,154 in 2023), related to ongoing Williams Treaty settlement distributions; large non-recurring fluctuation in settlement funds
economic_notes: Alderville Solar Limited Partnership (ASLP) is a government business enterprise generating $3,090,649 in revenue and $603,607 net income. Alderville Solar Inc. and Alderville Community Development Corporation are fully consolidated subsidiaries. Post year-end land purchase commitment of $2,212,000. Black Oak Savannah, small business centre rentals, and resource centre operations mentioned.
notes: Consolidated entity includes Alderville Solar Inc. and Alderville Community Development Corporation (fully consolidated) plus Alderville Solar Limited Partnership as a GBE under modified equity method. Williams Treaty Trust revenue is a significant and variable item ($6.75M in 2024 vs $4.47M in 2023) with large deferred revenue balance of $3.73M remaining. Accumulated surplus note shows a discrepancy: statement shows $58,382,450 but note 24 totals $58,394,792 — minor rounding/presentation difference. Expenses_salaries_total calculated from segment schedules (Administration $1,370,102 + Economic Development $490,083 + Education $437,834 + Land Management $133,643 + Social Development $686,494 + Health $1,354,613 = $4,472,769; Maintenance and Community Centre salaries not fully extracted from truncated text). Remuneration schedule not included in provided text. Land segment includes Williams Treaty settlement distributions. Post year-end land purchase commitment of $2,212,000. Current liabilities calculated as Due to government $318,324 + Accounts payable $1,660,928 = $1,979,252.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
